title: Moving Documents to Subitems

posts.author: Sara413 (Sara Mahan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello - we would love the ability to move documents from one item to another - specifically subitems. Our board is set up where the parent item is the master request and the subitems are the tasks in the request - it would be nice to pass the relevant documents to each task as needed.
